# task\-operational\-audit\-corrections — Complete the v0\.0\.3 operational audit correction program
status: ready  priority: 2  scope: scope-core

Milestone record for the correction program derived from hands\-on Waystation v0\.0\.3 and DuckBrain migration feedback\. The program fixes lifecycle/readiness integrity, cross\-worktree coordination boundaries, missing mutation APIs, issue data loss, misleading missing\-ledger behavior, semantic validation gaps, and derived\-output ergonomics while preserving local\-first JSON and the single core write path\.

## Acceptance
- All dependent implementation and release tasks are done with recorded commits and verification results\.
- Every OA finding in docs/operational\-audit\-corrections\-plan\.md is fixed or has a documented, evidence\-backed decision and linked verification result\.
- Waystation's own ledger, generated reports, documentation, binary, and graph agree on the released behavior\.
- A fresh agent can use task next, claim, lifecycle mutations, shared\-root selection, sync, validate, and briefs without relying on tribal knowledge or direct canonical JSON edits\.
